nasb.text: said with a loud voice, “Stand upright on your feet.” And he leaped up and began to walk.

esv.text: said in a loud voice, “Stand upright on your feet.” And he sprang up and began walking.

cnv.text: 就大聲說：“你起來，兩腳站直！”他就跳起來，並且走起路來。

ccb.text: 就高声对他说：“起来，两脚站直！”那人就跳了起来，开始行走。

csbs.text: 就大声说：“你起来，用你的两脚站直！”那个人就跳起来，开始走路了。
